lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਰਹਿਓ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kirapaal tthaakur rahio aavan jaanaa |
lines.english: Becoming Merciful, my Lord and Master has ended my comings and goings in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਮੇਰੀ ਰਾਖੈ ਮਮਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bandhan mukat santahu meree raakhai mamataa |3|
lines.english: He frees us from bondage, O Saints, and saves us from possessiveness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਾ ॥੪॥੨੭॥੯੭॥
lines.translit: gur mil naanak paarabraham pachhaanaa |4|27|97|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, Nanak has recognized the Supreme Lord God. ||4||27||97||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਾਈਆ ਕਟਿਅੜਾ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa mil bhaaeea kattiarraa jamakaal |
lines.english: Meeting with the humble beings, O Siblings of Destiny, the Messenger of Death is conquered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਹੋਆ ਖਸਮੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib man vutthaa hoaa khasam deaal |
lines.english: The True Lord and Master has come to dwell within my mind; my Lord and Master has become Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਬਿਨਸਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur bhettiaa binasiaa sabh janjaal |1|
lines.english: Meeting with the Perfect True Guru, all my worldly entanglements have ended. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਤੁਸਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tere darasan kau balihaaranai tus ditaa amrit naam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. By the Pleasure of Your Will, You have blessed me with the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਾ ਹਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere satiguraa hau tudh vittahu kurabaan |
lines.english: O my True Guru, I am a sacrifice to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਤੂੰ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਸੇਈ ਪੁਰਖ ਸੁਜਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jin toon seviaa bhaau kar seee purakh sujaan |
lines.english: Those who have served You with love are truly wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa pichhai chhutteeai jin andar naam nidhaan |
lines.english: Those who have the Treasure of the Naam within emancipate others as well as themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਏ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aae se paravaan heh jin gur miliaa subhaae |
lines.english: Blessed and acclaimed is the coming of those who have met the Guru with loving faith.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਆਤਮ ਦਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur jevadd daataa ko nahee jin ditaa aatam daan |2|
lines.english: There is no other Giver as great as the Guru, who has given the gift of the soul. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sache setee ratiaa daragah baisan jaae |
lines.english: Attuned to the True One, you shall obtain a place of honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੇ ਹਥਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karate hath vaddiaaeea poorab likhiaa paae |3|
lines.english: Greatness is in the Hands of the Creator; it is obtained by pre-ordained destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਸਚੋ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: sacho sach vakhaaneeai sacho budh bibek |
lines.english: So speak the Truest of the True. Through the True One, an intuitive and discerning mind is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: sach karataa sach karanahaar sach saahib sach ttek |
lines.english: True is the Creator, True is the Doer. True is our Lord and Master, and True is His Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵੈ ਏਕ ॥੪॥੨੮॥੯੮॥
lines.translit: sarab nirantar rav rahiaa jap naanak jeevai ek |4|28|98|
lines.english: Nanak lives by chanting and meditating on the One, who is pervading within and contained amongst all. ||4||28||98||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰੁ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਲਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur paramesur poojeeai man tan laae piaar |
lines.english: Worship the Guru, the Transcendent Lord, with your mind and body attuned to love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇਇ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa jeea kaa sabhasai dee adhaar |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of the soul; He gives Support to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਸਚਾ ਏਹੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bachan kamaavane sachaa ehu veechaar |
lines.english: Act according to the Instructions of the True Guru; this is the true philosophy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere saajan har har naam samaal |
lines.english: O my friend, reflect upon the Name of the Lord, Har, Har

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਰਤਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin saadhoo sangat ratiaa maaeaa mohu sabh chhaar |1|
lines.english: Without being attuned to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, all attachment to Maya is just dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਾਲ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sangat man vasai pooran hovai ghaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: . In the Saadh Sangat, He dwells within the mind, and one's works are brought to perfect fruition. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur samarath apaar gur vaddabhaagee darasan hoe |
lines.english: The Guru is All-powerful, the Guru is Infinite. By great good fortune, the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਗੁਰ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur agochar niramalaa gur jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: The Guru is Imperceptible, Immaculate and Pure. There is no other as great as the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur karataa gur karanahaar guramukh sachee soe |
lines.english: The Guru is the Creator, the Guru is the Doer. The Gurmukh obtains true glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਜਾਤੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਨਸਾ ਪੂਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur teerath gur paarajaat gur manasaa pooranahaar |
lines.english: The Guru is the Sacred Shrine of Pilgrimage, the Guru is the Wish-fulfilling Elysian Tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur te baahar kichh nahee gur keetaa lorre su hoe |2|
lines.english: Nothing is beyond the Guru; whatever He wishes comes to pass. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur samarath gur nirankaar gur aoochaa agam apaar |
lines.english: The Guru is All-powerful, the Guru is Formless; the Guru is Lofty, Inaccessible and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਇ ਉਧਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur daataa har naam dee udharai sabh sansaar |
lines.english: The Guru is the Fulfiller of the desires of the mind. The Guru is the Giver of the Name of the Lord, by which all the world is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੜੇ ਫਲ ਮਨਿ ਬਾਛੀਅਹਿ ਤਿਤੜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jitarre fal man baachheeeh titarre satigur paas |
lines.english: All the rewards which the mind desires are with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਅਗਮ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਕਥੇ ਕਥਨਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kee mahimaa agam hai kiaa kathe kathanahaar |3|
lines.english: The Praise of the Guru is so sublime-what can any speaker say? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਲਿਖੇ ਪਾਵਣੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhe paavane saach naam de raas |
lines.english: One whose destiny is so pre-ordained, obtains the Wealth of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਰਣੀ ਆਇਆਂ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saranee aaeaan baahurr nahee binaas |
lines.english: Entering the Sanctuary of the True Guru, you shall never die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਛੂਟਨੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant janahu sun bhaaeeho chhoottan saachai naae |
lines.english: O Saints, O Siblings of Destiny, listen: release comes only through the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵਿਸਰਉ ਏਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਾਸੁ ॥੪॥੨੯॥੯੯॥
lines.translit: har naanak kade na visrau ehu jeeo pindd teraa saas |4|29|99|
lines.english: Nanak: may I never forget You, Lord. This soul, body and breath are Yours. ||4||29||99||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਸਰੇਵਣੇ ਤੀਰਥ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan sarevane teerath har kaa naau |
lines.english: Worship the Feet of the Guru. Let the Name of the Lord be your sacred shrine of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਮੰਨੀਅਹਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aagai darageh maneeeh milai nithaave thaau |1|
lines.english: Hereafter, you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord; there, even the homeless find a home. ||1||
